brief.title: Here
brief.artistic_style: Warm-neutral color of honest light, slow steady drone/steadicam moves. No VFX, no transitions. Restrained documentary photography.

script.summary: A quiet montage of places most of us will never stand in — and the one we already do — carried by a single voice.

shots.description: Enniskerry, Ireland (interior cottage, dawn) - Wide, still frame of a quiet hallway in soft morning light. Dust motes.

prompt.primary: Wide, still frame of a quiet hallway in soft morning light. Dust motes.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Great Barrier Reef, Australia (underwater) - Slow drifting camera through the reef, mid-water, late afternoon sun shafting down from above.

prompt.primary: Slow drifting camera through the reef, mid-water, late afternoon sun shafting down from above.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Okavango Delta, Botswana (golden hour) - Aerial wide shot, drifting low over the flood at golden hour: elephants wading.

prompt.primary: Aerial wide shot, drifting low over the flood at golden hour: elephants wading.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Amazon canopy, Peru (aerial) - Wingtip-height pass across the Amazon canopy from 40 metres up. A macaw crosses frame left-to-right.

prompt.primary: Wingtip-height pass across the Amazon canopy from 40 metres up. A macaw crosses frame left-to-right.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Hokkaido, Japan (winter, night) - A held wide shot of a frozen lake under aurora, steam rising from a thermal vent. A single red fox crosses the ice.

prompt.primary: A held wide shot of a frozen lake under aurora, steam rising from a thermal vent. A single red fox crosses the ice.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Vatnajökull Glacier, Iceland (dusk) - A slow, sweeping panoramic drone shot over a massive blue glacier. Deep crevasses and ancient ice stretching to the horizon.

prompt.primary: A slow, sweeping panoramic drone shot over a massive blue glacier. Deep crevasses and ancient ice stretching to the horizon.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

shots.description: Closing image — wide exterior, Ireland - A clean, wide exterior shot of the cottage at dawn, smoke lifting from the chimney.

prompt.primary: A clean, wide exterior shot of the cottage at dawn, smoke lifting from the chimney.

routing.reasoning: Routed based on human presence and motion levels

attempts.judge_notes: Beautifully composed, matches the restrained documentary style.

dialogue.text: There are places on this planet you will never stand in.
A canopy you cannot reach except by wing.
And a frozen expanse of ancient ice, shifting under its own weight.
